title: Grazielia intermedia
taxonomy: Grazielia intermedia is a species of plant in the family Acanthaceae. It belongs to the genus Grazielia, which is a group of flowering plants. The classification of Grazielia intermedia places it within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. This plant is native to Brazil and is part of the diverse plant life in the region. The classification of Grazielia intermedia reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in its family and genus.
